criteria.label: Performance & Specs
criteria.description: Evaluation of CPU, RAM, and storage capabilities against user requirements.

criteria.label: Warranty & Support
criteria.description: Comparison of on-site vs carry-in service, response times, and duration.

criteria.label: Total Cost
criteria.description: Aggregated cost including hardware, shipping, warranties, and accessories.

criteria.label: Payment Terms
criteria.description: Flexibility of payment windows (e.g., 30 vs 45 days net).

criteria.label: Compliance & Security
criteria.description: Adherence to industry standards (SOC 2, ISO, FINMA) and data protection requirements.

criteria.label: Logistics Risk
criteria.description: Exposure to cross-border VAT, customs duties, and delivery lead times.

criteria.label: Sustainability
criteria.description: Environmental certifications (EPEAT, TCO, Energy Star) and hardware longevity.

criteria.label: Lifecycle Management
criteria.description: Availability of asset management tools, pre-enrollment services, and upgradeability.
